message:
test(e2e): update tests for refactored analysis and UI changes

Adjust E2E tests to work with the updated codebase:

- Update test assertions to match new InsightItem struct
- Adjust expected values for refactored insight generation
- Ensure tests pass with the reorganized board and model code
- Minor test setup adjustments for compatibility

These are maintenance changes to keep tests passing after the
analysis infrastructure and UI refactoring. No new test coverage
added in this commit.
